name: PharmaCyte Biotech, Inc.
business: PharmaCyte Biotech, Inc. is a biotechnology company developing cellular therapies for cancer using its proprietary cellulose-based live cell encapsulation technology, Cell-in-a-Box. The company's lead product candidate, CypCaps, is intended for the treatment of locally advanced, inoperable, non-metastatic pancreatic cancer (LAPC). The company has no approved products and its Investigational New Drug application for LAPC is currently on clinical hold by the FDA.
namedSuppliers: GSF-Forschungszentrum für Umwelt u. Gesundheit GmbH

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company focused on developing cellular therapies for cancer based upon a proprietary cellulose-based live cell encapsulation technology known as Cell-in-a-Box.

The cash used in investing activities for the year ended April 30, 2024 is mainly attributable to our entry into a Securities Purchase Agreement (the Femasys Purchase Agreement) with Femasys Inc. (Femasys), pursuant to which we purchased from Femasys for a sum of $5,000,000, (i) senior unsecured convertible notes (the Femasys Notes) in an aggregate principal amount of $5,000,000, convertible into shares of Femasys common stock, par value $0.001 per share (the Femasys Shares) at a conversion price of $1.18 per share, (ii) Series A Warrants (the Series A Warrants) to purchase up to an aggregate of 4,237,288 Femasys Shares at an exercise price of $1.18 per share, and (iii) Series B Warrants (the Series B Warrants, together with the Series A Warrants, the Femasys Warrants, and, together with the Notes, the Femasys Securities) to purchase up to an aggregate of 4,237,288 Femasys Shares at an exercise price of $1.475 per share.

On May 20, 2024, we entered into a securities purchase agreement (the TNF Purchase Agreement) with TNF Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (f/k/a MyMD Pharmaceuticals, Inc.) (TNF), pursuant to which we purchased from TNF (i) shares of TNF's Series G Convertible Preferred Stock (the TNF Preferred Shares), convertible into 3,854,626 shares of TNF's common stock, par value $0.001 per share (the TNF Common Shares), (ii) warrants to purchase up to 3,854,626 TNF Common Shares with a five-year term (the Long-Term Warrants) and (iii) warrants to purchase up to 3,854,626 TNF Common Shares with an 18-month term (the Short-Term Warrants and, together with the Long-Term Warrants, the TNF Warrants) for an aggregate purchase price of $7,000,000.

tamClaims.claim: The American Cancer Society estimated that in 2023 there were 64,000 people in the U.S. diagnosed with pancreatic cancer.
tamClaims.sentence: The American Cancer Society estimated that in 2023 there were 64,000 people in the U.S. diagnosed with pancreatic cancer.

tamClaims.claim: The American Cancer Society estimated that 51,000 patients with pancreatic cancer died in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: It also estimated 51,000 patients with pancreatic cancer died in 2023.
